title: juncus stenophyllus
intro: Juncus stenophyllus, also known as dwarf spike rush, is a type of flowering plant in the rush family Juncaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Juncus stenophyllus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Juncus stenophyllus is typically prepared for herbal use through infusion or decoction, and its extracts have also been studied for their potential as a natural remedy.
